description_long: This is a single, slip-on flat shoe designed for casual wear, featuring a light peach or nude color throughout its body. The toe area is adorned with a detailed, embroidered fox face in orange, white, and black, adding a playful and distinctive touch. The shoe has a low, rounded profile with a smooth, seamless upper and a slightly raised heel for comfort. The interior appears to be lined with a similar material as the exterior, likely synthetic or rubber, providing a soft and flexible fit. The sole is thin and dark, likely made of rubber or a similar material, offering basic traction for urban surfaces. There are no visible fasteners, logos, or additional decorative elements aside from the fox motif.
description: A peach-colored slip-on flat shoe with a fox face embroidered on the toe, featuring a smooth, seamless design and a thin, dark sole.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the rounded heel and seamless back of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted profile and the fox face detail near the toe.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the embroidered fox face prominently on the toe area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the fox face and the shoe's low, rounded shape.
